sections.paragraph:
f. often absol. and const. תִּפְאֶרֶת with suff. תִּפְאַרְתֹּו (from the root פָּאַר)-

(1) ornament, splendour, Exo 28:2, 40 Exo 28:40 Isa 3:18 52:1 , כְּלֵי תִפְאַרְתֵּךְ “thy splendid vessels.” Eze 16:17. Pro 28:12, בַּעֲלֹץ צַדִּיקִים רַבָּה תִפְאֶרֶת “when the righteous exult there is great splendour,” i.e. the citizens walk in splendid array.

(2) glory, Jdg 4:9. שֵׁם תִּפְאֶרֶת “glorious name,” Isa 63:14 also glorying, Isa 10:12 or the object of it, Isa 20:5 13:19 . Poet. used of the ark of the covenant, as the seat of the divine majesty, Psa 78:61. Compare עֹז No. 3.
